name: Algebraic Topology — Part 3: Homology Theory
description: Eilenberg-Steenrod axioms, long exact sequence of pair, excision, Mayer-Vietoris, CW complexes. Depends on Parts 1–2.
mermaid:
graph TD
    RefLongExact["Long exact (Part 1)"]
    RefSimpHom["Simplicial homology (Part 2)"]
    DefESA["Def: Eilenberg-Steenrod axioms"]
    AxHomotopy["Ax: Homotopy invariance"]
    AxExact["Ax: Long exact sequence of pair"]
    AxExcision["Ax: Excision"]
    AxDimension["Ax: Dimension"]
    ThmPair["Thm: Long exact sequence of pair (X,A)"]
    ThmExcision["Thm: Excision"]
    ThmMayerViet["Thm: Mayer-Vietoris sequence"]
    DefCW["Def: CW complex"]
    DefCell["Def: Cell attachment"]
    ThmCWHom["Thm: Cellular homology for CW"]
    CorSphere["Cor: H_k(S^n) = Z if k=0,n else 0"]
    ThmBrouwer["Thm: Brouwer fixed point"]
    LemSuspension["Lem: Suspension isomorphism"]
    ThmKunneth["Thm: Künneth formula"]
